result:
All 6 tests pass. Two bugs fixed in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** (cache.py:30) — a hit never moved the key to the MRU end, so a just-read key could be evicted. Added `self._data.move_to_end(key)` before returning the value.
2. **`put` evicted on updates** (cache.py:33) — the capacity check ran even when the key already existed, evicting an innocent entry before a size-neutral overwrite. Guarded with `key not in self._data`.

`SOLUTION.md` written with the root causes.
